mapper.sql: id , user_id, store_id, longitude, latitude, distance, result, remark, create_time
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_open_door_record as r LEFT JOIN user_info as u on u.userId = r.user_id LEFT JOIN store as s on s.storeId = r.store_id LEFT JOIN store as s2 on s2.storeId = r.device_store_id
r.status = 1
and u.phone LIKE concat('%',#{phone},'%')
and s.storeName LIKE concat('%',#{store_name},'%')
and s2.storeName LIKE concat('%',#{device_store_name},'%')
and r.store_id = #{store_id}
AND r.store_id in (${storeIds})
AND r.create_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime}
mapper.insert: insert into user_open_door_record (user_id, store_id, longitude, latitude, distance, result, remark, device_store_id, create_time) values (#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{longitude,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{latitude,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{distance,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{result,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deviceStoreId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select:
SELECT count(DISTINCT user_id) FROM user_open_door_record WHERE result = 1 and create_time > DATE_ADD(NOW(),INTERVAL -2 HOUR)
AND store_id in (${storeIds})
SELECT *, date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as open_time FROM user_open_door_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND create_time > #{startTime} ORDER BY id asc LIMIT 1
SELECT *, date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as open_time FROM user_open_door_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND id < #{id} ORDER BY id desc LIMIT 1
